title: ImageGenerationTool
description: CyberFabric extension: built-in image generation tool. Covers common generation parameters supported by the majority of providers.

aspect_ratio.description: Output image aspect ratio. Provider default if null.

resolution.description: Resolution in megapixels. Provider default if null.

quality.description: Generation quality level. Provider default if null.

output_format.description: Image file format. Provider default if null.

output_compression.description: Compression level (0-100). Applicable to jpeg. Provider default if null.

response_format.description: How the generated image is returned. Gateway default if null.
